items.title: Whether design belongs in Figma or Claude Design is a distraction from a bigger shift.

items.title: When people think software engineers, they tend to think jobs at tech companies building…
items.title_zh: 当人们想到软件工程师时，他们往往会想到科技公司的工作……
items.description: When people think software engineers, they tend to think jobs at tech companies building apps. The growth of the tech industry is so wired into our heads that that’s what we think the point and limit of software is. That’s just not how to…
items.description_zh: 当人们想到软件工程师时，他们往往会想到在科技公司开发应用程序的工作。科技行业的发展深深地烙印在我们的脑海中，这就是我们认为软件的重点和限制所在。那不是如何……
